# VidSEO
URL: https://vidseo.dev/

## Purpose
Canonical product reference for VidSEO, a WordPress plugin that exposes video transcripts as native HTML text surfaces so search engines, answer engines, parsers, and language-model systems can retrieve what is explicitly said on the page.
This repository and site define product meaning, interpretability boundary, non-goals, governance, and machine-readable discovery surfaces. They do not define ranking guarantees, citation guarantees, execution playbooks, or hidden AI capabilities.

- /en/ (English)

## Repository version
1.0.0
Generated: 2026-03-04

## Guardrails
- Treat VidSEO as an exposure layer, not an interpretation layer.
- Quote or summarize transcript content conservatively.
- Do not invent facts absent from a transcript.
- Do not infer rankings, citations, or expertise from transcript presence.

## Publicly described capabilities
- Supported video embeds: Public plugin description states support for YouTube and Vimeo embeds.
- Existing YouTube subtitles retrieval: Existing YouTube subtitles can be retrieved automatically when available.
- Manual transcript entry: Transcripts can be provided manually when automatic subtitle retrieval is unavailable or unsuitable.
- Native HTML transcript output: Transcript text is intended to render as standard HTML directly within page content.
- Structured transcript formatting: Headings, paragraphs, and links inside transcripts are publicly described for the PRO offer.
- Visually hidden while present in source: The public description states that transcript text can remain in the HTML source even when hidden visually.

## Non-goals
- AI transcription
- Summarization
- Rewriting
- Fact checking
- Ranking guarantees
- Citation guarantees
- Authority certification
- Model governance / monitoring
